news.title: Key Bitcoin price metric used by bulls falls to six-week low, but there’s a silver lining
news.body: Profit-taking by Bitcoin traders pushed the Coinbase BTC premium to a six-week low, but demand from longer-term traders put a clear support under the range lows.

news.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
news.body: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

news.title: Coinbase expands branded stablecoin infrastructure business with Flipcash USDF launch
news.body: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.

news.title: Bitcoin rallies through $77K despite spot BTC ETF outflows topping $2B
news.body: Bitcoin finds footing above $77,000 despite investors’ worry over BigTech earnings results and billion-dollar outflows from the BTC ETFs.

news.title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator
news.body: Hester Peirce will become an associate professor at a Virginia law school some 18 months after her term at the SEC expired, leaving another empty seat in the agency’s leadership.

news.title: Price predictions 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
news.body: Bitcoin looks on track for a rally toward $80,000 while HYPE, ZEC and a handful of altcoins are pushing toward their range highs.

news.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries
news.body: Five Republicans and one Democrat won or went to runoffs following primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky after a crypto-backed PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $20 million on media and ads.

news.title: Tether buys SoftBank’s stake in Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital
news.body: The stablecoin issuer bought SoftBank’s 26% stake, expanding its control over the public Bitcoin holder as it moves into lending, mining and capital markets.

news.title: Bitcoin sees fresh US sell-off as markets await Nvidia 'biggest earnings event'
news.body: Bitcoin struggles to overcome US selling pressure with markets on edge ahead of Nvidia's Q1 earnings report.

news.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news.body: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

news.title: Nearly 10% of Bitcoin supply is ‘structurally unsafe’ from quantum breakthrough: Glassnode
news.body: Analytics provider Glassnode identified 10% of Bitcoin supply as structurally exposed to a quantum breakthrough, underscoring the need for a quantum-proof implementation such as BIP-360.

news.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
news.body: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

news.title: EU opens consultation on MiCA stablecoin rules and DeFi gaps
news.body: EU opens MiCA review as consultation probes stablecoin interest rules, DeFi risks and classification gaps ahead of July's crypto authorization deadline.

news.title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
news.body: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

news.title: This Bitcoin price model targets ‘conservative’ $255K by year-end
news.body: Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.

translated.title: Bitcoin sobe através de $ 77K apesar das saídas spot de ETF de BTC superarem $ 2B

translated.title: Price predictions 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
translated.body: Bitcoin looks on track for a rally toward $80,000 while HYPE, ZEC and a handful of altcoins are pushing toward their range highs.

translated.title: Previsões de preços 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
translated.body: O Bitcoin parece estar a caminho de um rali em direção a $ 80.000, enquanto o HYPE, o ZEC e um punhado de altcoins estão avançando em direção aos seus máximos de alcance.

translated.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
translated.body: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

translated.title: Os traders do Ethereum alertam para uma queda "desagradável" do preço do ETH se o suporte de $ 2K quebrar
translated.body: O Ethereum está piscando um aviso de um padrão de baixa familiar que precedeu uma queda de 41% em janeiro, aumentando os riscos de um novo colapso.

translated.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
translated.body: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

translated.title: Missouri AG processa a operadora de caixas eletrônicos de criptomoedas CoinFlip ‘por permitir golpes’
translated.body: O processo seguiu o lançamento de uma investigação de dezembro de 2025 pelas autoridades do Missouri em várias empresas de caixas eletrônicos de criptomoedas, citando “estruturas de taxas enganosas” e golpes.

translated.title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator
translated.body: Hester Peirce will become an associate professor at a Virginia law school some 18 months after her term at the SEC expired, leaving another empty seat in the agency’s leadership.

translated.title: ‘Crypto Mom‘ da SEC vai ingressar na faculdade de direito, sinalizando o fim dos tempos no regulador
translated.body: Hester Peirce se tornará professora associada em uma faculdade de direito da Virgínia cerca de 18 meses após o término de seu mandato na SEC, deixando outro assento vazio na liderança da agência.

translated.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries
translated.body: Five Republicans and one Democrat won or went to runoffs following primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky after a crypto-backed PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $20 million on media and ads.

translated.title: O apoio de $ 20 MILHÕES do Fairshake PAC vale a pena em três primárias estaduais dos EUA
translated.body: Cinco republicanos e um democrata venceram ou foram para o segundo turno após as primárias na Geórgia, Alabama e Kentucky, depois que um PAC apoiado por criptomoedas e suas afiliadas gastaram um total de $ 20 milhões em mídia e anúncios.

translated.body: The stablecoin issuer bought SoftBank’s 26% stake, expanding its control over the public Bitcoin holder as it moves into lending, mining and capital markets.

translated.title: Bitcoin sobe através de $ 77K apesar das saídas spot de ETF de BTC superarem $ 2B
translated.body: O Bitcoin está acima de $ 77.000, apesar da preocupação dos investidores com os resultados dos lucros da BigTech e as saídas de bilhões de dólares dos ETFs do BTC.

translated.title: Price predictions 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
translated.body: Bitcoin looks on track for a rally toward $80,000 while HYPE, ZEC and a handful of altcoins are pushing toward their range highs.

translated.title: Previsões de preços 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
translated.body: O Bitcoin parece estar a caminho de um rali em direção a $ 80.000, enquanto o HYPE, o ZEC e um punhado de altcoins estão avançando em direção aos seus máximos de alcance.

translated.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
translated.body: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

translated.title: Os traders do Ethereum alertam para uma queda "desagradável" do preço do ETH se o suporte de $ 2K quebrar
translated.body: O Ethereum está piscando um aviso de um padrão de baixa familiar que precedeu uma queda de 41% em janeiro, aumentando os riscos de um novo colapso.

translated.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
translated.body: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

translated.title: Missouri AG processa a operadora de caixas eletrônicos de criptomoedas CoinFlip ‘por permitir golpes’
translated.body: O processo seguiu o lançamento de uma investigação de dezembro de 2025 pelas autoridades do Missouri em várias empresas de caixas eletrônicos de criptomoedas, citando “estruturas de taxas enganosas” e golpes.

translated.title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator
translated.body: Hester Peirce will become an associate professor at a Virginia law school some 18 months after her term at the SEC expired, leaving another empty seat in the agency’s leadership.

translated.title: ‘Crypto Mom‘ da SEC vai ingressar na faculdade de direito, sinalizando o fim dos tempos no regulador
translated.body: Hester Peirce se tornará professora associada em uma faculdade de direito da Virgínia cerca de 18 meses após o término de seu mandato na SEC, deixando outro assento vazio na liderança da agência.

translated.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries
translated.body: Five Republicans and one Democrat won or went to runoffs following primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky after a crypto-backed PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $20 million on media and ads.

translated.title: O apoio de $ 20 MILHÕES do Fairshake PAC vale a pena em três primárias estaduais dos EUA
translated.body: Cinco republicanos e um democrata venceram ou foram para o segundo turno após as primárias na Geórgia, Alabama e Kentucky, depois que um PAC apoiado por criptomoedas e suas afiliadas gastaram um total de $ 20 milhões em mídia e anúncios.

translated.title: Tether buys SoftBank’s stake in Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital
translated.body: The stablecoin issuer bought SoftBank’s 26% stake, expanding its control over the public Bitcoin holder as it moves into lending, mining and capital markets.

reasons: contexto reduziu a enfase da manchete

translated.title: Tether compra participação da SoftBank na empresa de Bitcoin Twenty One Capital
translated.body: O emissor de stablecoin comprou a participação de 26% do SoftBank, expandindo seu controle sobre o detentor público de Bitcoin à medida que se move para os mercados de empréstimos, mineração e capital.

translated.title: This Bitcoin price model targets ‘conservative’ $255K by year-end
translated.body: Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.

translated.title: Este modelo de preço do Bitcoin visa $ 255 mil "conservadores" até o final do ano
translated.body: Anteriormente, analistas da Bernstein e do co-fundador da BitMEX, Arthur Hayes, também projetaram que o Bitcoin atingiria novos recordes em 2026.

translated.title: Coinbase expands branded stablecoin infrastructure business with Flipcash USDF launch
translated.body: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.

translated.title: Coinbase expande negócios de infraestrutura de stablecoin de marca com o lançamento do Flipcash USDF
translated.body: O lançamento marca o mais recente avanço da Coinbase na infraestrutura de stablecoins de marca branca para empresas que constroem sistemas de pagamento e liquidação digitais de marca.

translated.title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
translated.body: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

translated.title: Fireblocks lança suporte de pagamento agêntico, junta-se à Fundação x402
translated.body: Se mesmo uma fração das mais de 1 bilhão de pessoas que usam IA diariamente delegar autoridade a agentes de IA para gastos online, a adoção de stablecoins cresceria substancialmente, disse um executivo da Fireblocks.

translated.title: Key Bitcoin price metric used by bulls falls to six-week low, but there’s a silver lining
translated.body: Profit-taking by Bitcoin traders pushed the Coinbase BTC premium to a six-week low, but demand from longer-term traders put a clear support under the range lows.

translated.title: A principal métrica de preço do Bitcoin usada pelos touros cai para a mínima de seis semanas, mas há um lado bom
translated.body: A obtenção de lucros pelos traders de Bitcoin empurrou o prêmio da Coinbase BTC para uma baixa de seis semanas, mas a demanda dos traders de longo prazo colocou um apoio claro sob as mínimas da faixa.

news.title: This Bitcoin price model targets ‘conservative’ $255K by year-end
news.body: Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.

news.title: Singapore revokes crypto payment license of Bsquared over regulatory breaches
news.body: MAS found deficiencies in Bsquared’s risk management and conflict-of-interest policies, and that the firm had provided false or misleading information to the regulator on multiple occasions.

news.title: Coinbase expands branded stablecoin infrastructure business with Flipcash USDF launch
news.body: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.

news.title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
news.body: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

news.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
news.body: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

news.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news.body: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

news.title: EU opens consultation on MiCA stablecoin rules and DeFi gaps
news.body: EU opens MiCA review as consultation probes stablecoin interest rules, DeFi risks and classification gaps ahead of July's crypto authorization deadline.

news.title: Nearly 10% of Bitcoin supply is ‘structurally unsafe’ from quantum breakthrough: Glassnode
news.body: Analytics provider Glassnode identified 10% of Bitcoin supply as structurally exposed to a quantum breakthrough, underscoring the need for a quantum-proof implementation such as BIP-360.

translated.title: Bitcoin rallies through $77K despite spot BTC ETF outflows topping $2B
translated.body: Bitcoin finds footing above $77,000 despite investors’ worry over BigTech earnings results and billion-dollar outflows from the BTC ETFs.

translated.title: Bitcoin sobe através de $ 77K apesar das saídas spot de ETF de BTC superarem $ 2B
translated.body: O Bitcoin está acima de $ 77.000, apesar da preocupação dos investidores com os resultados dos lucros da BigTech e as saídas de bilhões de dólares dos ETFs do BTC.

translated.title: Price predictions 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
translated.body: Bitcoin looks on track for a rally toward $80,000 while HYPE, ZEC and a handful of altcoins are pushing toward their range highs.

translated.title: Previsões de preços 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
translated.body: O Bitcoin parece estar a caminho de um rali em direção a $ 80.000, enquanto o HYPE, o ZEC e um punhado de altcoins estão avançando em direção aos seus máximos de alcance.

translated.title: Tether buys SoftBank’s stake in Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital
translated.body: The stablecoin issuer bought SoftBank’s 26% stake, expanding its control over the public Bitcoin holder as it moves into lending, mining and capital markets.

translated.title: Tether compra participação da SoftBank na empresa de Bitcoin Twenty One Capital
translated.body: O emissor de stablecoin comprou a participação de 26% do SoftBank, expandindo seu controle sobre o detentor público de Bitcoin à medida que se move para os mercados de empréstimos, mineração e capital.

translated.title: Ethereum traders warn of a ‘nasty’ ETH price drop if $2K support breaks
translated.body: Ethereum is flashing a warning of a familiar bearish pattern that preceded a 41% drop in January, raising risks of a fresh breakdown.

translated.title: Os traders do Ethereum alertam para uma queda "desagradável" do preço do ETH se o suporte de $ 2K quebrar
translated.body: O Ethereum está piscando um aviso de um padrão de baixa familiar que precedeu uma queda de 41% em janeiro, aumentando os riscos de um novo colapso.

translated.title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator
translated.body: Hester Peirce will become an associate professor at a Virginia law school some 18 months after her term at the SEC expired, leaving another empty seat in the agency’s leadership.

translated.title: ‘Crypto Mom‘ da SEC vai ingressar na faculdade de direito, sinalizando o fim dos tempos no regulador
translated.body: Hester Peirce se tornará professora associada em uma faculdade de direito da Virgínia cerca de 18 meses após o término de seu mandato na SEC, deixando outro assento vazio na liderança da agência.

translated.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries
translated.body: Five Republicans and one Democrat won or went to runoffs following primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky after a crypto-backed PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $20 million on media and ads.

translated.title: O apoio de $ 20 MILHÕES do Fairshake PAC vale a pena em três primárias estaduais dos EUA
translated.body: Cinco republicanos e um democrata venceram ou foram para o segundo turno após as primárias na Geórgia, Alabama e Kentucky, depois que um PAC apoiado por criptomoedas e suas afiliadas gastaram um total de $ 20 milhões em mídia e anúncios.

translated.title: This Bitcoin price model targets ‘conservative’ $255K by year-end
translated.body: Earlier, analysts at Bernstein and BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes also projected Bitcoin to reach new record highs in 2026.

translated.title: Este modelo de preço do Bitcoin visa $ 255 mil "conservadores" até o final do ano
translated.body: Anteriormente, analistas da Bernstein e do co-fundador da BitMEX, Arthur Hayes, também projetaram que o Bitcoin atingiria novos recordes em 2026.

translated.title: Singapore revokes crypto payment license of Bsquared over regulatory breaches
translated.body: MAS found deficiencies in Bsquared’s risk management and conflict-of-interest policies, and that the firm had provided false or misleading information to the regulator on multiple occasions.

translated.title: Cingapura revoga licença de pagamento de criptomoedas da Bsquared por violações regulatórias
translated.body: A MAS encontrou deficiências nas políticas de gerenciamento de risco e conflito de interesses da Bsquared, e que a empresa havia fornecido informações falsas ou enganosas ao regulador em várias ocasiões.

translated.title: Coinbase expands branded stablecoin infrastructure business with Flipcash USDF launch
translated.body: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.

translated.title: Coinbase expande negócios de infraestrutura de stablecoin de marca com o lançamento do Flipcash USDF
translated.body: O lançamento marca o mais recente avanço da Coinbase na infraestrutura de stablecoins de marca branca para empresas que constroem sistemas de pagamento e liquidação digitais de marca.

translated.title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
translated.body: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

translated.title: Fireblocks lança suporte de pagamento agêntico, junta-se à Fundação x402
translated.body: Se mesmo uma fração das mais de 1 bilhão de pessoas que usam IA diariamente delegar autoridade a agentes de IA para gastos online, a adoção de stablecoins cresceria substancialmente, disse um executivo da Fireblocks.

translated.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
translated.body: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

translated.title: Missouri AG processa a operadora de caixas eletrônicos de criptomoedas CoinFlip ‘por permitir golpes’
translated.body: O processo seguiu o lançamento de uma investigação de dezembro de 2025 pelas autoridades do Missouri em várias empresas de caixas eletrônicos de criptomoedas, citando “estruturas de taxas enganosas” e golpes.

translated.body: A UE abre a revisão do MiCA à medida que a consulta investiga as regras de juros das stablecoins, os riscos DeFi e as lacunas de classificação antes do prazo de autorização de criptomoedas de julho.

translated.body: O provedor de análise Glassnode identificou 10% do fornecimento de Bitcoin como estruturalmente exposto a um avanço quântico, ressaltando a necessidade de uma implementação à prova de quântica, como o BIP-360.

translated.title: EU opens consultation on MiCA stablecoin rules and DeFi gaps
translated.body: EU opens MiCA review as consultation probes stablecoin interest rules, DeFi risks and classification gaps ahead of July's crypto authorization deadline.

translated.title: UE abre consulta sobre regras de stablecoin MiCA e lacunas DeFi
translated.body: A UE abre a revisão do MiCA à medida que a consulta investiga as regras de juros das stablecoins, os riscos DeFi e as lacunas de classificação antes do prazo de autorização de criptomoedas de julho.

translated.title: Nearly 10% of Bitcoin supply is ‘structurally unsafe’ from quantum breakthrough: Glassnode
translated.body: Analytics provider Glassnode identified 10% of Bitcoin supply as structurally exposed to a quantum breakthrough, underscoring the need for a quantum-proof implementation such as BIP-360.

translated.title: Quase 10% da oferta de Bitcoin é "estruturalmente insegura" devido ao avanço quântico: Glassnode
translated.body: O provedor de análise Glassnode identificou 10% do fornecimento de Bitcoin como estruturalmente exposto a um avanço quântico, ressaltando a necessidade de uma implementação à prova de quântica, como o BIP-360.

news.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
news.body: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

news.title: Coinbase expands branded stablecoin infrastructure business with Flipcash USDF launch
news.body: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.

news.title: Bitcoin rallies through $77K despite spot BTC ETF outflows topping $2B
news.body: Bitcoin finds footing above $77,000 despite investors’ worry over BigTech earnings results and billion-dollar outflows from the BTC ETFs.

news.title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator
news.body: Hester Peirce will become an associate professor at a Virginia law school some 18 months after her term at the SEC expired, leaving another empty seat in the agency’s leadership.

news.title: Price predictions 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
news.body: Bitcoin looks on track for a rally toward $80,000 while HYPE, ZEC and a handful of altcoins are pushing toward their range highs.

news.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries

news.title: Tether buys SoftBank’s stake in Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital

translated.title: ‘Crypto Mom‘ da SEC vai ingressar na faculdade de direito, sinalizando o fim dos tempos no regulador
translated.body: Hester Peirce se tornará professora associada em uma faculdade de direito da Virgínia cerca de 18 meses após o término de seu mandato na SEC, deixando outro assento vazio na liderança da agência.

translated.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries
translated.body: Five Republicans and one Democrat won or went to runoffs following primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky after a crypto-backed PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $20 million on media and ads.

translated.title: O apoio de $ 20 MILHÕES do Fairshake PAC vale a pena em três primárias estaduais dos EUA
translated.body: Cinco republicanos e um democrata venceram ou foram para o segundo turno após as primárias na Geórgia, Alabama e Kentucky, depois que um PAC apoiado por criptomoedas e suas afiliadas gastaram um total de $ 20 milhões em mídia e anúncios.

translated.title: Este modelo de preço do Bitcoin visa $ 255 mil "conservadores" até o final do ano
translated.body: Anteriormente, analistas da Bernstein e do co-fundador da BitMEX, Arthur Hayes, também projetaram que o Bitcoin atingiria novos recordes em 2026.

translated.title: Singapore revokes crypto payment license of Bsquared over regulatory breaches
translated.body: MAS found deficiencies in Bsquared’s risk management and conflict-of-interest policies, and that the firm had provided false or misleading information to the regulator on multiple occasions.

translated.title: Cingapura revoga licença de pagamento de criptomoedas da Bsquared por violações regulatórias
translated.body: A MAS encontrou deficiências nas políticas de gerenciamento de risco e conflito de interesses da Bsquared, e que a empresa havia fornecido informações falsas ou enganosas ao regulador em várias ocasiões.

translated.body: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.

translated.title: Coinbase expande negócios de infraestrutura de stablecoin de marca com o lançamento do Flipcash USDF
translated.body: O lançamento marca o mais recente avanço da Coinbase na infraestrutura de stablecoins de marca branca para empresas que constroem sistemas de pagamento e liquidação digitais de marca.

translated.title: Fireblocks launches agentic payment support, joins x402 Foundation
translated.body: If even a fraction of the more than 1 billion people who use AI daily delegate authority to AI agents for online spending, stablecoin adoption would grow substantially, a Fireblocks executive said.

translated.title: Fireblocks lança suporte de pagamento agêntico, junta-se à Fundação x402
translated.body: Se mesmo uma fração das mais de 1 bilhão de pessoas que usam IA diariamente delegar autoridade a agentes de IA para gastos online, a adoção de stablecoins cresceria substancialmente, disse um executivo da Fireblocks.

translated.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip ‘for enabling scams’
translated.body: The lawsuit followed the launch of a December 2025 investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies, citing “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

translated.title: Missouri AG processa a operadora de caixas eletrônicos de criptomoedas CoinFlip ‘por permitir golpes’
translated.body: O processo seguiu o lançamento de uma investigação de dezembro de 2025 pelas autoridades do Missouri em várias empresas de caixas eletrônicos de criptomoedas, citando “estruturas de taxas enganosas” e golpes.

news.body: Bernstein says miners control 27 GW of planned power and $90 billion in AI deals, giving them a strategic edge as electricity becomes the main constraint on data center growth.

news.body: Bitcoin futures and orderbook data show dip buyers waiting for a BTC price drop below $70,000.

news.title: Polymarket partners with Nasdaq to list private company contracts
news.body: New markets will let users trade on fundraising, valuation and other startup milestones using data from Nasdaq Private Market, extending forecasting into private capital.

news.title: Senator Warren questions OCC chief on approval of ‘ineligible’ crypto trust charters
news.body: The Massachusetts lawmaker asked the US Comptroller of the Currency to provide all communications between the agency and Donald Trump potentially related to the charter approvals.

news.title: BoE deputy says tokenization could cut costs, boost competition
news.body: The UK central bank said digital money should remain trusted and interoperable as it weighs stablecoin reforms and near-24/7 settlement to support tokenized markets.

news.title: XRP price risks 50% drop despite 9-day ETF inflow streak
news.body: Spot XRP ETFs record net inflows for nine days, absorbing sell pressure and potentially supporting an XRP price recovery over time.

news.title: Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
news.body: BTC price stayed pinned below $77,000 amid rising US bond yields and oil prices, with market analysts saying Bitcoin is now at a "crucial level of support."

news.title: A viral hedgehog, Vitalik Buterin, and a bow: the GraphDex launch that crypto won't forget
news.body: 5,800 users in two hours. One QR code. One bow that went viral.

news.title: Tor Project to lead Web3 crowdfunding to support internet freedom
news.body: Global internet freedom has declined for 15 consecutive years, with more countries restricting access to more of the internet, according to Freedom House.

news.title: Recent Bitcoin holders sell $770M BTC at a loss amid $65K BTC price calls
news.body: More than 10,000 Bitcoin have been sold at a loss by short-term holders in recent days, adding fuel to analysts’ predictions that BTC price will fall to $65,000.

news.title: Bitcoin miner Canaan posts $88.7M net loss in Q1 amid BTC decline
news.body: Canaan’s Q1 results were dragged down by a $25 million inventory write-down and a 75% quarterly drop in equipment sales as Bitcoin prices retreated from their highs.

news.title: Estonian regulator partially suspends Zondacrypto operator license
news.body: Estonia’s FIU has partially suspended BB Trade Estonia OÜ’s license, giving the Zondacrypto operator 30 days to fix compliance issues or risk full revocation.

news.title: Zcash is 'running its own bull market' as ZEC price paints 88% rally setup
news.body: ZEC has jumped 18% in three days as privacy coins rally, defying a 3.45% drop across the wider crypto market.

news.title: South Korean funeral company records $33M unrealized loss on leveraged ETH ETFs
news.body: South Korea’s seventh-largest mutual aid company is currently sitting on a $33 million paper loss on its leveraged Ether ETF investment, following the crypto market downturn.

news.title: Pump.fun accounts for over one-third of Solana’s Q1 revenue despite memecoin slowdown
news.body: Pump.fun pulled in $124.7 million in Q1 2026, making it Solana’s largest revenue generator even as memecoin activity cooled, while the network’s RWA market cap crossed $2 billion.

translated.body: New markets will let users trade on fundraising, valuation and other startup milestones using data from Nasdaq Private Market, extending forecasting into private capital.

translated.title: Poli-mercado faz parceria com a Nasdaq para listar contratos de empresas privadas
translated.body: Novos mercados permitirão que os usuários negociem com captação de recursos, avaliação e outros marcos iniciais usando dados do Nasdaq Private Market, estendendo a previsão para o capital privado.

translated.title: O senador Warren questiona o chefe da OCC sobre a aprovação de cartas de confiança de criptomoedas "inelegíveis"

translated.title: BoE deputy says tokenization could cut costs, boost competition
translated.body: The UK central bank said digital money should remain trusted and interoperable as it weighs stablecoin reforms and near-24/7 settlement to support tokenized markets.

translated.title: Deputado do BoE diz que a tokenização pode cortar custos e aumentar a concorrência
translated.body: O banco central do Reino Unido disse que o dinheiro digital deve permanecer confiável e interoperável, uma vez que pesa as reformas da stablecoin e a liquidação quase 24/7 para apoiar os mercados tokenizados.

translated.title: XRP price risks 50% drop despite 9-day ETF inflow streak

translated.title: O preço do XRP arrisca uma queda de 50%, apesar da sequência de entrada de ETF de 9 dias
translated.body: Os ETFs de XRP spot registram entradas líquidas por nove dias, absorvendo a pressão de venda e potencialmente suportando uma recuperação do preço de XRP ao longo do tempo.

translated.title: Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
translated.body: BTC price stayed pinned below $77,000 amid rising US bond yields and oil prices, with market analysts saying Bitcoin is now at a "crucial level of support."

translated.title: O preço do Bitcoin permanece abaixo de $ 77 mil, já que os rendimentos dos títulos dos EUA estão próximos das máximas de 20 anos
translated.body: O preço do BTC permaneceu abaixo de $ 77.000 em meio ao aumento dos rendimentos dos títulos dos EUA e dos preços do petróleo, com analistas de mercado dizendo que o Bitcoin está agora em um "nível crucial de suporte".

translated.title: A viral hedgehog, Vitalik Buterin, and a bow: the GraphDex launch that crypto won't forget
translated.body: 5,800 users in two hours. One QR code. One bow that went viral.

translated.title: Um ouriço viral, Vitalik Buterin, e um arco: o lançamento do GraphDex que as criptomoedas não esquecerão

translated.title: Recent Bitcoin holders sell $770M BTC at a loss amid $65K BTC price calls
translated.body: More than 10,000 Bitcoin have been sold at a loss by short-term holders in recent days, adding fuel to analysts’ predictions that BTC price will fall to $65,000.

translated.title: Detentores recentes de Bitcoin vendem $ 770M BTC com prejuízo em meio a chamadas de preço de $ 65K BTC
translated.body: Mais de 10.000 Bitcoins foram vendidos com prejuízo por detentores de curto prazo nos últimos dias, aumentando as previsões dos analistas de que o preço do BTC cairá para $ 65.000.

translated.title: Bitcoin miner Canaan posts $88.7M net loss in Q1 amid BTC decline
translated.body: Canaan’s Q1 results were dragged down by a $25 million inventory write-down and a 75% quarterly drop in equipment sales as Bitcoin prices retreated from their highs.

translated.title: A mineradora de Bitcoin Canaan registra perda líquida de $ 88,7 milhões no primeiro trimestre em meio à queda do BTC
translated.body: Os resultados do primeiro trimestre da Canaan foram arrastados para baixo por uma baixa de estoque de $ 25 milhões e uma queda trimestral de 75% nas vendas de equipamentos, à medida que os preços do Bitcoin recuaram de suas máximas.

translated.title: Estonian regulator partially suspends Zondacrypto operator license
translated.body: Estonia’s FIU has partially suspended BB Trade Estonia OÜ’s license, giving the Zondacrypto operator 30 days to fix compliance issues or risk full revocation.

translated.title: Regulador estoniano suspende parcialmente licença de operador da Zondacrypto
translated.body: A FIU da Estônia suspendeu parcialmente a licença da BB Trade Estonia OÜ, dando ao operador de Zondacrypto 30 dias para corrigir problemas de conformidade ou correr o risco de revogação total.

translated.title: Zcash is 'running its own bull market' as ZEC price paints 88% rally setup

translated.title: A Zcash está "administrando seu próprio mercado em alta" enquanto o preço da ZEC pinta 88% de configuração de rali

translated.title: Os dados mostram que os compradores do Bitcoin estão esperando preços mais baixos: $ 70 mil é a próxima parada do BTC?

translated.body: New markets will let users trade on fundraising, valuation and other startup milestones using data from Nasdaq Private Market, extending forecasting into private capital.

translated.title: Poli-mercado faz parceria com a Nasdaq para listar contratos de empresas privadas
translated.body: Novos mercados permitirão que os usuários negociem com captação de recursos, avaliação e outros marcos iniciais usando dados do Nasdaq Private Market, estendendo a previsão para o capital privado.

translated.title: Senator Warren questions OCC chief on approval of ‘ineligible’ crypto trust charters
translated.body: The Massachusetts lawmaker asked the US Comptroller of the Currency to provide all communications between the agency and Donald Trump potentially related to the charter approvals.

translated.title: O senador Warren questiona o chefe da OCC sobre a aprovação de cartas de confiança de criptomoedas "inelegíveis"

translated.title: BoE deputy says tokenization could cut costs, boost competition
translated.body: The UK central bank said digital money should remain trusted and interoperable as it weighs stablecoin reforms and near-24/7 settlement to support tokenized markets.

translated.title: Deputado do BoE diz que a tokenização pode cortar custos e aumentar a concorrência
translated.body: O banco central do Reino Unido disse que o dinheiro digital deve permanecer confiável e interoperável, uma vez que pesa as reformas da stablecoin e a liquidação quase 24/7 para apoiar os mercados tokenizados.

translated.title: O preço do XRP arrisca uma queda de 50%, apesar da sequência de entrada de ETF de 9 dias

translated.title: Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
translated.body: BTC price stayed pinned below $77,000 amid rising US bond yields and oil prices, with market analysts saying Bitcoin is now at a "crucial level of support."

translated.title: O preço do Bitcoin permanece abaixo de $ 77 mil, já que os rendimentos dos títulos dos EUA estão próximos das máximas de 20 anos
translated.body: O preço do BTC permaneceu abaixo de $ 77.000 em meio ao aumento dos rendimentos dos títulos dos EUA e dos preços do petróleo, com analistas de mercado dizendo que o Bitcoin está agora em um "nível crucial de suporte".

news.body: Bitcoin futures and orderbook data show dip buyers waiting for a BTC price drop below $70,000.

news.title: Polymarket partners with Nasdaq to list private company contracts
news.body: New markets will let users trade on fundraising, valuation and other startup milestones using data from Nasdaq Private Market, extending forecasting into private capital.

news.title: Senator Warren questions OCC chief on approval of ‘ineligible’ crypto trust charters
news.body: The Massachusetts lawmaker asked the US Comptroller of the Currency to provide all communications between the agency and Donald Trump potentially related to the charter approvals.

news.title: BoE deputy says tokenization could cut costs, boost competition
news.body: The UK central bank said digital money should remain trusted and interoperable as it weighs stablecoin reforms and near-24/7 settlement to support tokenized markets.

news.title: XRP price risks 50% drop despite 9-day ETF inflow streak
news.body: Spot XRP ETFs record net inflows for nine days, absorbing sell pressure and potentially supporting an XRP price recovery over time.

news.title: Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
news.body: BTC price stayed pinned below $77,000 amid rising US bond yields and oil prices, with market analysts saying Bitcoin is now at a "crucial level of support."

news.body: 5,800 users in two hours. One QR code. One bow that went viral.

news.body: Global internet freedom has declined for 15 consecutive years, with more countries restricting access to more of the internet, according to Freedom House.

news.title: Recent Bitcoin holders sell $770M BTC at a loss amid $65K BTC price calls
news.body: More than 10,000 Bitcoin have been sold at a loss by short-term holders in recent days, adding fuel to analysts’ predictions that BTC price will fall to $65,000.

news.title: Bitcoin miner Canaan posts $88.7M net loss in Q1 amid BTC decline
news.body: Canaan’s Q1 results were dragged down by a $25 million inventory write-down and a 75% quarterly drop in equipment sales as Bitcoin prices retreated from their highs.

news.title: Estonian regulator partially suspends Zondacrypto operator license
news.body: Estonia’s FIU has partially suspended BB Trade Estonia OÜ’s license, giving the Zondacrypto operator 30 days to fix compliance issues or risk full revocation.

news.title: Zcash is 'running its own bull market' as ZEC price paints 88% rally setup
news.body: ZEC has jumped 18% in three days as privacy coins rally, defying a 3.45% drop across the wider crypto market.

news.title: South Korean funeral company records $33M unrealized loss on leveraged ETH ETFs
news.body: South Korea’s seventh-largest mutual aid company is currently sitting on a $33 million paper loss on its leveraged Ether ETF investment, following the crypto market downturn.

news.title: Pump.fun accounts for over one-third of Solana’s Q1 revenue despite memecoin slowdown
news.body: Pump.fun pulled in $124.7 million in Q1 2026, making it Solana’s largest revenue generator even as memecoin activity cooled, while the network’s RWA market cap crossed $2 billion.
